title: Two-photon microscopy and spectral detection for ex vivo imaging of individual stem cells
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This protocol describes the use of two-photon microscopy to image the dynamic behavior of hematopoietic stem cells interacting with their niche. To distinguish the eGFP expressing cells from auto-fluorescent background, we use spectral finger-printing. We include image processing steps to visualize the results and extract quantitative information.
steps_raw: This protocol describes the use of two-photon microscopy to image the dynamic behavior of hematopoietic stem cells interacting with their niche. To distinguish the eGFP expressing cells from auto-fluorescent background, we use spectral finger-printing. We include image processing steps to visualize the results and extract quantitative information.
